title: WAMUL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL)
short_info: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official WAMUL website. The last date to submit the application form is 11-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not above 28 years as on 1st January, 2026.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 28 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age relaxation may be given in case of appropriate or outstanding candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduation from a recognized Institute/University.
qualification.details: Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics: Full time Graduation from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 2 years of full time working experience in Warehousing / Logistics.

salary_details.details: CTC Rs. 4.55 lakhs per annum including P.F & other Contributions. (Negotiable and commensurate with qualification and experience)

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application.
